# @smartspectra/node-sdk-darwin-arm64

**Internal package — do not install directly.**

This is the prebuilt SmartSpectra native runtime for `darwin-arm64`. It is
a binary payload (the `smartspectra_capi` shared library plus its closure) for
[`@smartspectra/node-sdk`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@smartspectra/node-sdk), which declares it as a
regular dependency and loads it at runtime on a matching host.

Install the main package instead:

```bash
npm install @smartspectra/node-sdk
```

See the [`@smartspectra/node-sdk`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@smartspectra/node-sdk) documentation for usage.
